pose_policy.idle_hurt_layering: weapon is rendered behind the character body; no floating front-mounted gun layer
pose_policy.attack_layering: weapon is raised toward the battlefield with left/center/right aim variants, explicit per-weapon stock/trigger/foregrip/muzzle anchors, heavy recoil, visible settle, and recovered frame-4 stance
pose_policy.baked_vfx: disabled; muzzle flash, smoke, tracers, bullets, and element VFX are runtime-only in battle.gd
pose_policy.runtime_sync: projectiles spawn from attack_01 muzzle offsets; battle.gd locks aim during the attack window
